---
# title 是笔记标题，也会显示在 Notes 自动目录中。
title: "First Variation of Area"
# description 是自动目录中显示的内容摘要。
description: "A short example note on the first variation formula."
# date 用于标记发布日期，并决定目录的时间排序。
date: 2026-07-11
# categories 为笔记添加可筛选的主题标签。
categories: [minimal surfaces, variational methods]
---

Let $F_t:\Sigma\to M$ be a smooth variation of an immersion $F=F_0$, with variational vector field

$$
X=\left.\frac{\partial F_t}{\partial t}\right|_{t=0}.
$$

For a closed hypersurface and a normal variation $X=f\nu$, the first variation of area is

$$
\left.\frac{d}{dt}\right|_{t=0}\operatorname{Area}(F_t(\Sigma))
=-\int_\Sigma Hf\,d\mu.
$$

Thus a hypersurface is stationary for every compactly supported variation precisely when its mean curvature vanishes.
